description: Bird风格实务场景NL2SQL测试集 - 5个Schema共100条

test_cases.question: 银行共有多少个活跃账户？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM accounts WHERE status = 'active'

test_cases.question: 列出所有支行名称和所在城市
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT branch_name, city FROM branches

test_cases.question: 哪个账户余额最高？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT holder_name, balance FROM accounts ORDER BY balance DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 所有账户的总余额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(balance) AS total_balance FROM accounts

test_cases.question: 每个支行有多少个账户？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, COUNT(*) AS account_count FROM accounts a JOIN branches b ON a.branch_id = b.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name

test_cases.question: 各账户类型的平均余额分别是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT account_type, AVG(balance) AS avg_balance FROM accounts GROUP BY account_type

test_cases.question: 2024年1月通过手机渠道的消费总金额是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total FROM transactions WHERE txn_type = '消费' AND channel = '手机' AND txn_date BETWEEN '2024-01-01' AND '2024-01-31'

test_cases.question: 按交易渠道统计交易笔数和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT channel, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(amount) AS total_amount FROM transactions GROUP BY channel

test_cases.question: 查询每个账户的交易总金额排名
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, SUM(t.amount) AS total_txn FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id GROUP BY a.account_id, a.holder_name ORDER BY total_txn DESC

test_cases.question: 查询有逾期还款记录的贷款
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT l.loan_id, a.holder_name, l.loan_type, l.principal, lp.payment_date FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN loan_payments lp ON l.loan_id = lp.loan_id WHERE lp.is_overdue = 1

test_cases.question: 各支行的贷款总额和平均利率分别是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(l.principal) AS total_principal, AVG(l.interest_rate) AS avg_rate FROM branches b JOIN accounts a ON b.branch_id = a.branch_id JOIN loans l ON a.account_id = l.account_id GROUP BY b.branch_name

test_cases.question: 列出所有状态为逾期的贷款及其持有人
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, l.loan_type, l.principal, l.status FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id WHERE l.status = 'overdue'

test_cases.question: 找出余额低于5000但有活跃贷款的账户
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, a.balance, l.loan_type, l.principal FROM accounts a JOIN loans l ON a.account_id = l.account_id WHERE a.balance < 5000 AND l.status = 'active'

test_cases.question: 统计每个客户2024年1月和2月的消费金额对比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(t.txn_date) = 1 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS jan_spending, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(t.txn_date) = 2 THEN t.amount ELSE 0 END) AS feb_spending FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.txn_type = '消费' AND YEAR(t.txn_date) = 2024 GROUP BY a.account_id, a.holder_name

test_cases.question: 各贷款类型的数量和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT loan_type, COUNT(*) AS loan_count, SUM(principal) AS total_principal FROM loans GROUP BY loan_type

test_cases.question: 计算各贷款的已还本金总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT l.loan_id, a.holder_name, l.principal, SUM(lp.principal_paid) AS total_paid FROM loans l JOIN accounts a ON l.account_id = a.account_id JOIN loan_payments lp ON l.loan_id = lp.loan_id GROUP BY l.loan_id, a.holder_name, l.principal

test_cases.question: 查询定期存款账户
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT holder_name, balance FROM accounts WHERE account_type = '定期'

test_cases.question: 查找单笔消费金额超过账户余额10%的交易
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT a.holder_name, t.txn_date, t.amount, a.balance, ROUND(t.amount / a.balance * 100, 2) AS pct_of_balance FROM accounts a JOIN transactions t ON a.account_id = t.account_id WHERE t.txn_type = '消费' AND t.amount > a.balance * 0.1 ORDER BY pct_of_balance DESC

test_cases.question: 2024年每月的存款和取款总额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MONTH(txn_date) AS month, SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = '存款' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS deposits, SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = '取款' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS withdrawals FROM transactions WHERE YEAR(txn_date) = 2024 GROUP BY MONTH(txn_date)

test_cases.question: 按支行统计总存款余额排名
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT b.branch_name, SUM(a.balance) AS total_deposits FROM branches b JOIN accounts a ON b.branch_id = a.branch_id GROUP BY b.branch_name ORDER BY total_deposits DESC

test_cases.question: 一共有多少家门店？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM stores

test_cases.question: 列出所有旗舰店
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT store_name, city FROM stores WHERE store_type = '旗舰店'

test_cases.question: 哪个商品的售价最高？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM retail_products ORDER BY unit_price DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 各门店的销售总额分别是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_name, SUM(sa.total_amount) AS total_sales FROM stores s JOIN sales sa ON s.store_id = sa.store_id GROUP BY s.store_name ORDER BY total_sales DESC

test_cases.question: 各商品类别的销售数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT rp.category, SUM(sa.quantity) AS total_qty FROM retail_products rp JOIN sales sa ON rp.product_id = sa.product_id GROUP BY rp.category

test_cases.question: 哪个商品销量最高？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT rp.product_name, SUM(sa.quantity) AS total_sold FROM retail_products rp JOIN sales sa ON rp.product_id = sa.product_id GROUP BY rp.product_name ORDER BY total_sold DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 计算各商品的毛利率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT rp.product_name, rp.unit_cost, rp.unit_price, ROUND((rp.unit_price - rp.unit_cost) / rp.unit_price * 100, 2) AS gross_margin_pct FROM retail_products rp ORDER BY gross_margin_pct DESC

test_cases.question: 各省份的门店数量和总面积
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT province, COUNT(*) AS store_count, SUM(area_sqm) AS total_area FROM stores GROUP BY province

test_cases.question: 找出有折扣的销售记录及折扣金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_name, rp.product_name, sa.sale_date, sa.quantity, sa.unit_price, sa.discount_rate, ROUND(sa.quantity * sa.unit_price * sa.discount_rate, 2) AS discount_amount FROM sales sa JOIN stores s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id JOIN retail_products rp ON sa.product_id = rp.product_id WHERE sa.discount_rate > 0

test_cases.question: 各门店2024年1月和2月的销售额对比及环比增长率
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_name, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(sa.sale_date) = 1 THEN sa.total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS jan_sales, SUM(CASE WHEN MONTH(sa.sale_date) = 2 THEN sa.total_amount ELSE 0 END) AS feb_sales FROM stores s JOIN sales sa ON s.store_id = sa.store_id WHERE YEAR(sa.sale_date) = 2024 GROUP BY s.store_name

test_cases.question: 查询2024年2月的所有销售记录
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_name, rp.product_name, sa.sale_date, sa.quantity, sa.total_amount FROM sales sa JOIN stores s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id JOIN retail_products rp ON sa.product_id = rp.product_id WHERE sa.sale_date BETWEEN '2024-02-01' AND '2024-02-29' ORDER BY sa.sale_date

test_cases.question: 列出所有食品类商品
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT product_name, unit_price FROM retail_products WHERE category = '食品'

test_cases.question: 各供应商供应的商品数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT supplier, COUNT(*) AS product_count FROM retail_products GROUP BY supplier

test_cases.question: 按门店类型统计平均日销售额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_type, ROUND(SUM(sa.total_amount) / COUNT(DISTINCT sa.sale_date), 2) AS avg_daily_sales FROM stores s JOIN sales sa ON s.store_id = sa.store_id GROUP BY s.store_type

test_cases.question: 杭州所有门店的总销售额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(sa.total_amount) AS total FROM stores s JOIN sales sa ON s.store_id = sa.store_id WHERE s.city = '杭州'

test_cases.question: 有多少种商品？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM retail_products

test_cases.question: 计算有机牛奶在各门店的销量和销售额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_name, SUM(sa.quantity) AS total_qty, SUM(sa.total_amount) AS total_revenue FROM sales sa JOIN stores s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id JOIN retail_products rp ON sa.product_id = rp.product_id WHERE rp.product_name = '有机牛奶' GROUP BY s.store_name

test_cases.question: 查找销售额低于同类别平均水平的门店
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.store_name, rp.category, SUM(sa.total_amount) AS store_cat_sales FROM sales sa JOIN stores s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id JOIN retail_products rp ON sa.product_id = rp.product_id GROUP BY s.store_id, s.store_name, rp.category HAVING store_cat_sales < (SELECT AVG(sub_total) FROM (SELECT sa2.store_id, SUM(sa2.total_amount) AS sub_total FROM sales sa2 JOIN retail_products rp2 ON sa2.product_id = rp2.product_id WHERE rp2.category = rp.category GROUP BY sa2.store_id) AS sub)

test_cases.question: 查看当前有效的促销活动
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT promo_name, start_date, end_date, discount_pct, category FROM promotions WHERE end_date >= CURDATE()

test_cases.question: 面积最大的三家门店
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT store_name, city, area_sqm FROM stores ORDER BY area_sqm DESC LIMIT 3

test_cases.question: 一共有多少所学校？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM schools

test_cases.question: 列出所有高中
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT school_name, district FROM schools WHERE school_type = '高中'

test_cases.question: 西湖区有哪些学校？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT school_name, school_type FROM schools WHERE district = '西湖区'

test_cases.question: 各学校的学生人数
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.school_name, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM schools s JOIN school_students ss ON s.school_id = ss.school_id GROUP BY s.school_name

test_cases.question: 各科目的平均分是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT subject, AVG(score) AS avg_score FROM test_scores GROUP BY subject ORDER BY avg_score DESC

test_cases.question: 数学成绩最高的学生是谁？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ss.name, ts.score FROM school_students ss JOIN test_scores ts ON ss.student_id = ts.student_id WHERE ts.subject = '数学' ORDER BY ts.score DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 各学校各科目的平均分
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.school_name, ts.subject, AVG(ts.score) AS avg_score FROM schools s JOIN school_students ss ON s.school_id = ss.school_id JOIN test_scores ts ON ss.student_id = ts.student_id GROUP BY s.school_name, ts.subject ORDER BY s.school_name, avg_score DESC

test_cases.question: 找出成绩低于60分的学生
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ss.name, s.school_name, ts.subject, ts.score FROM school_students ss JOIN schools s ON ss.school_id = s.school_id JOIN test_scores ts ON ss.student_id = ts.student_id WHERE ts.score < 60

test_cases.question: 各年级的学生人数
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT grade, COUNT(*) AS student_count FROM school_students GROUP BY grade ORDER BY grade

test_cases.question: 各教师职称的人数分布
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT title, COUNT(*) AS teacher_count FROM teachers GROUP BY title ORDER BY teacher_count DESC

test_cases.question: 期中考试语文成绩排名前5的学生
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ss.name, s.school_name, ts.score FROM school_students ss JOIN schools s ON ss.school_id = s.school_id JOIN test_scores ts ON ss.student_id = ts.student_id WHERE ts.subject = '语文' AND ts.exam_type = '期中' ORDER BY ts.score DESC LIMIT 5

test_cases.question: 各学校的师生比
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.school_name, s.teacher_count, COUNT(ss.student_id) AS actual_students, ROUND(COUNT(ss.student_id) / s.teacher_count, 1) AS student_teacher_ratio FROM schools s LEFT JOIN school_students ss ON s.school_id = ss.school_id GROUP BY s.school_id, s.school_name, s.teacher_count

test_cases.question: 查找教龄超过15年的高级教师
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, subject, years_teaching FROM teachers WHERE title = '高级' AND years_teaching > 15

test_cases.question: 一共有多少名教师？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM teachers

test_cases.question: 找出某次考试中同一学生语文数学分差超过15分的情况
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ss.name, t1.score AS chinese_score, t2.score AS math_score, ABS(t1.score - t2.score) AS score_diff FROM school_students ss JOIN test_scores t1 ON ss.student_id = t1.student_id AND t1.subject = '语文' JOIN test_scores t2 ON ss.student_id = t2.student_id AND t2.subject = '数学' AND t1.exam_type = t2.exam_type WHERE ABS(t1.score - t2.score) > 15

test_cases.question: 各区有多少所学校？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT district, COUNT(*) AS school_count FROM schools GROUP BY district

test_cases.question: 列出所有男生
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT name, grade FROM school_students WHERE gender = 'M'

test_cases.question: 查找同一学生期中和期末语文成绩变化
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT ss.name, t1.score AS midterm, t2.score AS final, (t2.score - t1.score) AS change FROM school_students ss JOIN test_scores t1 ON ss.student_id = t1.student_id AND t1.subject = '语文' AND t1.exam_type = '期中' JOIN test_scores t2 ON ss.student_id = t2.student_id AND t2.subject = '语文' AND t2.exam_type = '期末'

test_cases.question: 初中各学校的学生数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.school_name, COUNT(ss.student_id) AS student_count FROM schools s JOIN school_students ss ON s.school_id = ss.school_id WHERE s.school_type = '初中' GROUP BY s.school_name

test_cases.question: 各学校语文和数学的平均分及总排名
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.school_name, AVG(CASE WHEN ts.subject = '语文' THEN ts.score END) AS avg_chinese, AVG(CASE WHEN ts.subject = '数学' THEN ts.score END) AS avg_math FROM schools s JOIN school_students ss ON s.school_id = ss.school_id JOIN test_scores ts ON ss.student_id = ts.student_id GROUP BY s.school_name

test_cases.question: 一共有多少个小区？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM communities

test_cases.question: 列出所有住宅小区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT community_name, district, city FROM communities WHERE property_type = '住宅'

test_cases.question: 成交价最高的房产交易
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT pt.txn_date, pt.price, pt.buyer_name, c.community_name FROM property_transactions pt JOIN properties p ON pt.property_id = p.property_id JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE pt.txn_type = '买卖' ORDER BY pt.price DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 各小区的房产数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.community_name, COUNT(*) AS unit_count FROM communities c JOIN properties p ON c.community_id = p.community_id GROUP BY c.community_name

test_cases.question: 各区的交易总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.district, SUM(pt.price) AS total_price FROM property_transactions pt JOIN properties p ON pt.property_id = p.property_id JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE pt.txn_type = '买卖' GROUP BY c.district

test_cases.question: 各中介经手的交易数量和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT agent_name, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(price) AS total_amount FROM property_transactions GROUP BY agent_name

test_cases.question: 各小区的均价（万元/平方米）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.community_name, ROUND(AVG(pt.price / p.area_sqm), 2) AS avg_price_per_sqm FROM property_transactions pt JOIN properties p ON pt.property_id = p.property_id JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE pt.txn_type = '买卖' GROUP BY c.community_name ORDER BY avg_price_per_sqm DESC

test_cases.question: 查询所有租赁交易及其月租
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.community_name, p.unit_number, p.area_sqm, pt.price AS monthly_rent, pt.buyer_name AS tenant FROM property_transactions pt JOIN properties p ON pt.property_id = p.property_id JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE pt.txn_type = '租赁'

test_cases.question: 查找面积超过120平的四居室
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT p.unit_number, p.area_sqm, p.bedrooms, c.community_name FROM properties p JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE p.area_sqm > 120 AND p.bedrooms = 4

test_cases.question: 按月统计买卖交易数量和总金额
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MONTH(txn_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, SUM(price) AS total_amount FROM property_transactions WHERE txn_type = '买卖' GROUP BY MONTH(txn_date) ORDER BY month

test_cases.question: 总共有多少套房产？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM properties

test_cases.question: 列出2024年3月的所有交易
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.community_name, p.unit_number, pt.txn_type, pt.price, pt.buyer_name FROM property_transactions pt JOIN properties p ON pt.property_id = p.property_id JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE pt.txn_date BETWEEN '2024-03-01' AND '2024-03-31'

test_cases.question: 计算各小区房产的平均面积和平均单价
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.community_name, AVG(p.area_sqm) AS avg_area, ROUND(AVG(pt.price / p.area_sqm), 4) AS avg_unit_price FROM communities c JOIN properties p ON c.community_id = p.community_id LEFT JOIN property_transactions pt ON p.property_id = pt.property_id AND pt.txn_type = '买卖' GROUP BY c.community_name

test_cases.question: 各城市有多少个小区？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT city, COUNT(*) AS community_count FROM communities GROUP BY city

test_cases.question: 列出深圳的所有小区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT community_name, district FROM communities WHERE city = '深圳'

test_cases.question: 找出链家小李经手的所有交易详情
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT c.community_name, p.unit_number, p.area_sqm, pt.txn_type, pt.txn_date, pt.price, pt.buyer_name FROM property_transactions pt JOIN properties p ON pt.property_id = p.property_id JOIN communities c ON p.community_id = c.community_id WHERE pt.agent_name = '链家小李'

test_cases.question: 南朝向的房产有多少套？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM properties WHERE orientation = '南'

test_cases.question: 各楼层区间的房产数量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN floor_level <= 6 THEN '低层(1-6)' WHEN floor_level <= 15 THEN '中层(7-15)' ELSE '高层(16+)' END AS floor_range, COUNT(*) AS count FROM properties GROUP BY floor_range

test_cases.question: 各中介的平均交易金额和交易成功率排名
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT agent_name, COUNT(*) AS txn_count, AVG(price) AS avg_price, SUM(CASE WHEN txn_type = '买卖' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sale_count FROM property_transactions GROUP BY agent_name ORDER BY avg_price DESC

test_cases.question: 查找2020年后建成的小区
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT community_name, built_year, total_units FROM communities WHERE built_year >= 2020

test_cases.question: 一共有多少条运单？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM shipments

test_cases.question: 列出所有仓库及其容量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT warehouse_name, city, capacity_tons FROM warehouses

test_cases.question: 哪些运单还在运输中？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT shipment_id, ship_date, destination_city, weight_kg FROM shipments WHERE status = 'in_transit'

test_cases.question: 各客户的发货总重量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT lc.company_name, SUM(s.weight_kg) AS total_weight FROM logistics_customers lc JOIN shipments s ON lc.customer_id = s.customer_id GROUP BY lc.company_name ORDER BY total_weight DESC

test_cases.question: 各仓库的出货量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT w.warehouse_name, COUNT(*) AS shipment_count, SUM(s.weight_kg) AS total_weight FROM warehouses w JOIN shipments s ON w.warehouse_id = s.warehouse_id GROUP BY w.warehouse_name

test_cases.question: 运费总收入是多少？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT SUM(shipping_cost) AS total_revenue FROM shipments

test_cases.question: 各客户的运费总支出及平均每公斤运费
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT lc.company_name, SUM(s.shipping_cost) AS total_cost, ROUND(SUM(s.shipping_cost) / SUM(s.weight_kg), 2) AS cost_per_kg FROM logistics_customers lc JOIN shipments s ON lc.customer_id = s.customer_id GROUP BY lc.company_name ORDER BY total_cost DESC

test_cases.question: 各目的城市的运单数和总货物重量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT destination_city, COUNT(*) AS shipment_count, SUM(weight_kg) AS total_weight FROM shipments GROUP BY destination_city ORDER BY total_weight DESC

test_cases.question: 查找尚未送达的运单
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.shipment_id, lc.company_name, s.ship_date, s.destination_city, s.status FROM shipments s JOIN logistics_customers lc ON s.customer_id = lc.customer_id WHERE s.status != 'delivered'

test_cases.question: 计算各运单的运输时长（天数）
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.shipment_id, lc.company_name, s.ship_date, s.delivery_date, DATEDIFF(s.delivery_date, s.ship_date) AS transit_days FROM shipments s JOIN logistics_customers lc ON s.customer_id = lc.customer_id WHERE s.delivery_date IS NOT NULL ORDER BY transit_days DESC

test_cases.question: 长期合同客户有哪些？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT company_name, contact_person, city, monthly_volume FROM logistics_customers WHERE contract_type = '长期'

test_cases.question: 使用率最高的仓库
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT warehouse_name, current_usage_pct FROM warehouses ORDER BY current_usage_pct DESC LIMIT 1

test_cases.question: 按月统计发货量和运费收入
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT MONTH(ship_date) AS month, COUNT(*) AS shipment_count, SUM(weight_kg) AS total_weight, SUM(shipping_cost) AS total_revenue FROM shipments WHERE YEAR(ship_date) = 2024 GROUP BY MONTH(ship_date) ORDER BY month

test_cases.question: 找出平均运输时长超过2天的目的城市
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT destination_city, AVG(DATEDIFF(delivery_date, ship_date)) AS avg_transit_days, COUNT(*) AS shipment_count FROM shipments WHERE delivery_date IS NOT NULL GROUP BY destination_city HAVING avg_transit_days > 2

test_cases.question: 阿里巴巴总共发了多少运单？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM shipments s JOIN logistics_customers lc ON s.customer_id = lc.customer_id WHERE lc.company_name = '阿里巴巴'

test_cases.question: 各仓库的使用率和剩余可用容量
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT warehouse_name, capacity_tons, current_usage_pct, ROUND(capacity_tons * (100 - current_usage_pct) / 100, 2) AS available_tons FROM warehouses

test_cases.question: 查找发往北京的所有运单
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT s.shipment_id, lc.company_name, s.ship_date, s.weight_kg, s.shipping_cost, s.status FROM shipments s JOIN logistics_customers lc ON s.customer_id = lc.customer_id WHERE s.destination_city = '北京'

test_cases.question: 各客户按月的发货量趋势
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT lc.company_name, MONTH(s.ship_date) AS month, SUM(s.weight_kg) AS monthly_weight, COUNT(*) AS monthly_shipments FROM logistics_customers lc JOIN shipments s ON lc.customer_id = s.customer_id WHERE YEAR(s.ship_date) = 2024 GROUP BY lc.company_name, MONTH(s.ship_date) ORDER BY lc.company_name, month

test_cases.question: 一共有多少个物流客户？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total FROM logistics_customers

test_cases.question: 哪些客户的实际发货量超过月均发货量？
test_cases.gold_sql: SELECT lc.company_name, lc.monthly_volume AS expected_monthly, SUM(s.weight_kg) / 1000 AS actual_monthly_tons FROM logistics_customers lc JOIN shipments s ON lc.customer_id = s.customer_id GROUP BY lc.customer_id, lc.company_name, lc.monthly_volume HAVING actual_monthly_tons > lc.monthly_volume
